summary.lv: Clarity Labs meklē Associate QA konsultantu ar bakalaura grādu vai pabeigtu Manual QA kursu, kas izstrādās un uzturēs testa gadījumus, dokumentēs defektus un sadarbosies ar izstrādātājiem.
summary.en: Clarity Labs is hiring an Associate QA Consultant with a bachelor's degree or a completed Manual QA course to build and maintain test cases, document defects and collaborate with developers.
